TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fuxing a sakuwan ku Taoyuan. kumud nu kalesakan, 336.75 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 195.32 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 120.65 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 10,692 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 3,655 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,817 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 64%(Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u Tayal ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Fuxing mala 10 a cuwen atu 58 ku niyazu'. kina 58 a niyazu'sa, Pyasan(śĮĒťõÖŚĪĪ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu' , Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan , Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi . Śĺ©ŤąąŚćÄ(ś≥įťõÖŤ™ě:Pyasan) . Fuxing "Ataya a kamu, Pyasan" nu Cung-hua-min-cu Tau-yuan a sakuwan tini i nuwalian nutimulan nu Tau-yuan, nu wamisan a belaw u Ś§ßśļ™ a kakitizaan, nuwalian nuamisan belaw u śĖįŚĆóŚłāšłČŚ≥Ĺ a kakitizaan, ,ÁÉŹšĺÜa kakitizaan, patatules nuwalian nutimulan ŤáļÁĀ£ÁúĀŚģúŤė≠a kuwan Ś§ßŚźĆťĄČ a kenis, satipan nutimulan atu satipan nuwamisan belaw u ŤáļÁĀ£ÁúĀśĖįÁęĻ a kuwan ŚįĖÁü≥ťĄČa kenis, ,ťóúŤ•Ņťéģa kenis. ahebal nu hekal pakala tu 351 ping-bang-kung-li, "macalap tu Tau-yuan pulung nu hekal a lala' pitu hun tu tusa", u tademaw pakala tu 1.2 bang satabakiay a hekal nu Tau-yuan, caay kaktuud ku tademaw, adidi' ku sakuwan a tademaw, i labuay muenengay a tademaw hatu ŤáļÁĀ£ŚéüšĹŹśįĎśóŹś≥įťõÖ a binacadan. šĺĚÁÖß" . kilul tu "hulic a lekec nu kakitizaaan" Fuxing a sakuwan nu Yin-cu-min-cunay a sakuwan, nu sihulicay teked a sakaput a tademaw i Tau-yuan a kenis atu nu zumaay a sakuwan caay kalecad ku kawaw, nu kenisay akakitizaan u teked ku situngusay, Śĺ©ŤąąŚćÄa yakuba u teked amikawaw caay ku nu Tau-yuan caay kunipacuculan nu cenbu, a patizeng tu Fuxing a dayhiwan tu pakaniay tu sateked a kawaw a pahulic. laylay Pyasan, Pyasan , . malumanay a ngangan "Caw-ban-san" han, pikuwanan nu Lipun a ziday nu Sin-cu-cou Ta-si binacadan a lala' zikuzan nu ngangayawan saayaway patizeng tu Caw-ban a kenis. u ngangan nu kakitizaana lalayan i 1886 a mihcaan ci Liu-min-cuan i tini amiazih, maazih kya Da-ke-kan a sauwac tusaay a tukus u satukay a sauwac mahiza u tuluay a kalimucu' a sapad, pangangan han tu kalimucu' buyu' a sapad han. u zikuzaay nu kahung-tian a ziday,tiniay pangangan han tu Cya-ban-san, uynian a buyu' i Atayla a ngangan Pyasan han, uyni a imi u sapabaliw tu kakitizaan a tuud, nuzumaan a kamu nu Atayla a kamu Pyasan "pi-ya-san" han, namakay nu Atayla a nuyazu' tumuk a ngangan, sazikuzay nu hun-tu a ziday amitena' tu kunu hulam midebung a mingayaw tu a mapatay, u sapakinin tu nu binacadan a tademaw a pangangan. . pikuwanan hena nu Lipun, mikantukay nu cebu midemec tizaay mueneng a Yin-cu-min, pasumad han ku ngangan nu kakitizaan tu "Ciyaw-pan-san" ngangan tu mizipa' ku kuku' i sapad. makay pikuwanan henay nu Lipun muculal tu ku masakalimucu' buyu' a sapad-piazih, hananay u kamu nipangangan ni Liw-min-cwn, atu kanu nu kamu,nika 1899 a mihcaan "Taywan syehuy pakatineng" u pacebaay a ngangan pabacu' tu kalimucu' sapad buyu' u ngiha nu layakay tu "„āę„ÉÉ„Éź„É≥„āĹ„ā°„É≥" katineng tu ngangan nu kalimucu' sapat buyu' i pikantuk nu cenbu ayaw nu 1899 a mihca izaw tu. aca, "tazipaan a sapad" caay tu ku nu Lipunay a kamu. sumad ngangan 1954ŚĻī10śúą31 . 1954 a mihcaan cacay a bataan izaw ku tulu a bataan izaw ku cacay tu nu Bu-sin-syang. itawya nisutan i sin-bun,"Yin-cu-min a palimulak tu kalecuhan nu Cung-tung tungusay cumelak ku kanatal". u yakuba ku paketunay misinsin i sey-bu a malaheci. namahiza i Cyaw-pan adidi'ay a cacudadan nu wawa pasumad han ku ngangan Cye-suw adidi'ay a cacudadan han, pili' i pulecuhan ni Cyang-cung-cen miteka..2014 a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad tusa a bataan izaw ku lima a demiad, Taw-yen a kuwan sumad han tu Csya-se tu Taw-yen a kenis hawsa, Bu-sin a kenis pasumad han tu se-sya a kakitizaantu Bu-sin a kakitizaan. panukas tu ngangan 2014ŚĻī" . 2014 a mihca "Taywan Yin-cu-min a niyazu' mikawaw tu masasepaw" nipaketunan sumad tu ngangan "Pi-ya-way' hakiya "Pi-ya-san" nglab ayawtu izaw tu ku natatengilan misumad tu ngangan "Cyaw-pan han", nika katuud ku paculiay a binawlan. lalangawan ungsing pikuwanan henay nu Lipun, Bu-sin a kenis lima ku nipatadas tu unsing, macacidek u S-lin unsing, Sin-sin unsing, Kaw-i' unsing, Pa-lin-cyaw unsing, Siw-u-lay unsing, cay ku Slin unsing atu Sin-sin unsing dada', izaw hena ku zumaay a unsing i capi nu siy-li a sasanga'an namisanga' maenip i diheb nu sauwac, Pa-lin a unsing i 1997 a mihca muliyaw makazih, pangangan han Ye-hen unsing.
S.PHON: fu*iŇč a sakuwan ku taojuan. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti ***.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, **,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(tajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tajar~…ĺ ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan fu*iŇč mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, pjasan(*** **), *ańßaw(takan) , wsir~…ĺuŇč , ńßbun , ńßbun-sin*umi , kinjawpan , *aŇčaj , kawbu Ē~ ° , kńßpan , *aga Ē~ ° , *ańßu Ē~ ° , *apu Ē~ ° , *us , jubaŇč , tri*an , zińßiŇč , kaju-bar~…ĺi* , kzjaj , tuba , r~…ĺuńßuŇč , br~…ĺńßuj , br~…ĺńßuj , bir~…ĺus , *ojaw , *ojaw , sir~…ĺoŇč , *ojaw , snazi , kin Ē~ °r~…ĺwan , s*ij , ¶jasi , juwńßbun raka , kajwaj , *us , *mo ¶jan , babau , *nau , ksunu Ē~ ° , *…ôńßuj , kur~…ĺi , sbunaw , *uri , uruw , tkasan , *aka , pijawaj , tgr~…ĺ…ô* , saru ¶ , twan nokan , zińßiŇč , *rańßu , t*wij , Ňčurus , *pńßaj , bar~…ĺuŇč , Ē~ °bu bar~…ĺuŇč , *ara , *uzi . ***(***:pjasan) . fu*iŇč "ataja a kamu, pjasan" nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min- ¶u tau-juan a sakuwan tini i nuwar~…ĺian nutimur~…ĺan nu tau-juan, nu wamisan a b…ôr~…ĺaw u ** a kakitizaan, nuwar~…ĺian nuamisan b…ôr~…ĺaw u ***** a kakitizaan, ,**a kakitizaan, patatur~…ĺ…ôs nuwar~…ĺian nutimur~…ĺan *****a kuwan *** a k…ônis, satipan nutimur~…ĺan atu satipan nuwamisan b…ôr~…ĺaw u ***** a kuwan ***a k…ônis, ,***a k…ônis. ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ pakar~…ĺa tu *** piŇč-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, "ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu tau-juan pur~…ĺuŇč nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pitu ńßun tu tusa", u tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *.* baŇč satabakiaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tau-juan, ¶aaj kaktuud ku tad…ômaw, adidi Ē~ ° ku sakuwan a tad…ômaw, i r~…ĺabuaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw ńßatu ******** a bina ¶adan. **" . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu "ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ nu kakitizaaan" fu*iŇč a sakuwan nu jin- ¶u-min- ¶unaj a sakuwan, nu sińßur~…ĺi ¶aj t…ôk…ôd a sakaput a tad…ômaw i tau-juan a k…ônis atu nu zumaaj a sakuwan ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kawaw, nu k…ônisaj akakitizaan u t…ôk…ôd ku situŇčusaj, ***a jakuba u t…ôk…ôd amikawaw ¶aaj ku nu tau-juan ¶aaj kunipa ¶u ¶ur~…ĺan nu ¶…ônbu, a patiz…ôŇč tu fu*iŇč a dajńßiwan tu pakaniaj tu sat…ôk…ôd a kawaw a pańßur~…ĺi ¶. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj pjasan, pjasan , . mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan " ¶aw-ban-san" ńßan, pikuwanan nu r~…ĺipun a zidaj nu sin- ¶u- ¶ou ta-si bina ¶adan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° zikuzan nu ŇčaŇčajawan saajawaj patiz…ôŇč tu ¶aw-ban a k…ônis. u ŇčaŇčan nu kakitizaana r~…ĺar~…ĺajan i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i r~…ĺiu-min- ¶uan i tini amiazińß, maazińß kja da-k…ô-kan a sauwa ¶ tusaaj a tukus u satukaj a sauwa ¶ mańßiza u tur~…ĺuaj a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° a sapad, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° buju Ē~ ° a sapad ńßan. u zikuzaaj nu kańßuŇč-tian a zidaj,tiniaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶ja-ban-san, ujnian a buju Ē~ ° i atajr~…ĺa a ŇčaŇčan pjasan ńßan, ujni a imi u sapabar~…ĺiw tu kakitizaan a tuud, nuzumaan a kamu nu atajr~…ĺa a kamu pjasan "pi-ja-san" ńßan, namakaj nu atajr~…ĺa a nujazu Ē~ ° tumuk a ŇčaŇčan, sazikuzaj nu ńßun-tu a zidaj amit…ôna Ē~ ° tu kunu ńßur~…ĺam mid…ôbuŇč a miŇčajaw tu a mapataj, u sapakinin tu nu bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw a paŇčaŇčan. . pikuwanan ńß…ôna nu r~…ĺipun, mikantukaj nu ¶…ôbu mid…ôm…ô ¶ tizaaj mu…ôn…ôŇč a jin- ¶u-min, pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan nu kakitizaan tu " ¶ijaw-pan-san" ŇčaŇčan tu mizipa Ē~ ° ku kuku Ē~ ° i sapad. makaj pikuwanan ńß…ônaj nu r~…ĺipun mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ tu ku masakar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° buju Ē~ ° a sapad-piazińß, ńßananaj u kamu nipaŇčaŇčan ni r~…ĺiw-min- ¶wn, atu kanu nu kamu,nika **** a mińß ¶aan "tajwan sj…ôńßuj pakatin…ôŇč" u pa ¶…ôbaaj a ŇčaŇčan paba ¶u Ē~ ° tu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° sapad buju Ē~ ° u Ňčińßa nu r~…ĺajakaj tu "*******" katin…ôŇč tu ŇčaŇčan nu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° sapat buju Ē~ ° i pikantuk nu ¶…ônbu ajaw nu **** a mińß ¶a izaw tu. a ¶a, "tazipaan a sapad" ¶aaj tu ku nu r~…ĺipunaj a kamu. sumad ŇčaŇčan ********** . **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan izaw ku tur~…ĺu a bataan izaw ku ¶a ¶aj tu nu bu-sin-sjaŇč. itawja nisutan i sin-bun,"jin- ¶u-min a par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč tuŇčusaj ¶um…ôr~…ĺak ku kanatar~…ĺ". u jakuba ku pak…ôtunaj misinsin i s…ô-bu a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. namańßiza i ¶jaw-pan adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶udadan nu wawa pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan ¶j…ô-suw adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶udadan ńßan, pir~…ĺi Ē~ ° i pur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ¶jaŇč- ¶uŇč- ¶…ôn mit…ôka..**** a mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan izaw ku r~…ĺima a d…ômiad, taw-j…ôn a kuwan sumad ńßan tu ¶sja-s…ô tu taw-j…ôn a k…ônis ńßawsa, bu-sin a k…ônis pasumad ńßan tu s…ô-sja a kakitizaantu bu-sin a kakitizaan. panukas tu ŇčaŇčan *****" . **** a mińß ¶a "tajwan jin- ¶u-min a nijazu Ē~ ° mikawaw tu masas…ôpaw" nipak…ôtunan sumad tu ŇčaŇčan "pi-ja-waj Ē~ ° ńßakija "pi-ja-san" Ňčr~…ĺab ajawtu izaw tu ku natat…ôŇčir~…ĺan misumad tu ŇčaŇčan " ¶jaw-pan ńßan", nika katuud ku pa ¶ur~…ĺiaj a binawr~…ĺan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan uŇčsiŇč pikuwanan ńß…ônaj nu r~…ĺipun, bu-sin a k…ônis r~…ĺima ku nipatadas tu unsiŇč, ma ¶a ¶id…ôk u s-r~…ĺin unsiŇč, sin-sin unsiŇč, kaw-i Ē~ ° unsiŇč, pa-r~…ĺin- ¶jaw unsiŇč, siw-u-r~…ĺaj unsiŇč, ¶aj ku sr~…ĺin unsiŇč atu sin-sin unsiŇč dada Ē~ °, izaw ńß…ôna ku zumaaj a unsiŇč i ¶api nu sij-r~…ĺi a sasaŇča Ē~ °an namisaŇča Ē~ ° ma…ônip i dińß…ôb nu sauwa ¶, pa-r~…ĺin a unsiŇč i **** a mińß ¶a mur~…ĺijaw makazińß, paŇčaŇčan ńßan j…ô-ńß…ôn unsiŇč.
S.FORM: Fuxing a sakuwan ku Taoyuan. kumud nu kalesakan, 336.75 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 195.32 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 120.65 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 10,692 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 3,655 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 6,817 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 64%(Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u Tayal ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Fuxing mala 10 a cuwen atu 58 ku niyazu'. kina 58 a niyazu'sa, Pyasan(śĮĒťõÖŚĪĪ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Rahaw(Takan) , Wsilung , Hbun , Hbun-sinqumi , Kinyawpan , Rangay , Kawbu' , Khpan , Raga' , Rahu' , Qapu' , Qus , Yubang , Triqan , Zihing , Kayu-baliq , Kzyay , Tuba , Luhung , Blhuy , Blhuy , Bilus , Qoyaw , Qoyaw , Silong , Qoyaw , Snazi , Kin'lwan , Sqiy , Cyasi , Yuwhbun raka , Kayway , Qus , Qmocyan , Babau , Qnau , Ksunu' , Qehuy , Kuli , Sbunaw , Quri , Uruw , Tkasan , Raka , Piyaway , Tgleq , Saruc , Twan nokan , Zihing , Qrahu , Tqwiy , Ngurus , Qphay , Balung , 'Bu balung , Qara , Quzi . Śĺ©ŤąąŚćÄ(ś≥įťõÖŤ™ě:Pyasan) . Fuxing "Ataya a kamu, Pyasan" nu Cung-hua-min-cu Tau-yuan a sakuwan tini i nuwalian nutimulan nu Tau-yuan, nu wamisan a belaw u Ś§ßśļ™ a kakitizaan, nuwalian nuamisan belaw u śĖįŚĆóŚłāšłČŚ≥Ĺ a kakitizaan, ,ÁÉŹšĺÜa kakitizaan, patatules nuwalian nutimulan ŤáļÁĀ£ÁúĀŚģúŤė≠a kuwan Ś§ßŚźĆťĄČ a kenis, satipan nutimulan atu satipan nuwamisan belaw u ŤáļÁĀ£ÁúĀśĖįÁęĻ a kuwan ŚįĖÁü≥ťĄČa kenis, ,ťóúŤ•Ņťéģa kenis. ahebal nu hekal pakala tu 351 ping-bang-kung-li, "macalap tu Tau-yuan pulung nu hekal a lala' pitu hun tu tusa", u tademaw pakala tu 1.2 bang satabakiay a hekal nu Tau-yuan, caay kaktuud ku tademaw, adidi' ku sakuwan a tademaw, i labuay muenengay a tademaw hatu ŤáļÁĀ£ŚéüšĹŹśįĎśóŹś≥įťõÖ a binacadan. šĺĚÁÖß" . kilul tu "hulic a lekec nu kakitizaaan" Fuxing a sakuwan nu Yin-cu-min-cunay a sakuwan, nu sihulicay teked a sakaput a tademaw i Tau-yuan a kenis atu nu zumaay a sakuwan caay kalecad ku kawaw, nu kenisay akakitizaan u teked ku situngusay, Śĺ©ŤąąŚćÄa yakuba u teked amikawaw caay ku nu Tau-yuan caay kunipacuculan nu cenbu, a patizeng tu Fuxing a dayhiwan tu pakaniay tu sateked a kawaw a pahulic. laylay Pyasan, Pyasan , . malumanay a ngangan "Caw-ban-san" han, pikuwanan nu Lipun a ziday nu Sin-cu-cou Ta-si binacadan a lala' zikuzan nu ngangayawan saayaway patizeng tu Caw-ban a kenis. u ngangan nu kakitizaana lalayan i 1886 a mihcaan ci Liu-min-cuan i tini amiazih, maazih kya Da-ke-kan a sauwac tusaay a tukus u satukay a sauwac mahiza u tuluay a kalimucu' a sapad, pangangan han tu kalimucu' buyu' a sapad han. u zikuzaay nu kahung-tian a ziday,tiniay pangangan han tu Cya-ban-san, uynian a buyu' i Atayla a ngangan Pyasan han, uyni a imi u sapabaliw tu kakitizaan a tuud, nuzumaan a kamu nu Atayla a kamu Pyasan "pi-ya-san" han, namakay nu Atayla a nuyazu' tumuk a ngangan, sazikuzay nu hun-tu a ziday amitena' tu kunu hulam midebung a mingayaw tu a mapatay, u sapakinin tu nu binacadan a tademaw a pangangan. . pikuwanan hena nu Lipun, mikantukay nu cebu midemec tizaay mueneng a Yin-cu-min, pasumad han ku ngangan nu kakitizaan tu "Ciyaw-pan-san" ngangan tu mizipa' ku kuku' i sapad. makay pikuwanan henay nu Lipun muculal tu ku masakalimucu' buyu' a sapad-piazih, hananay u kamu nipangangan ni Liw-min-cwn, atu kanu nu kamu,nika 1899 a mihcaan "Taywan syehuy pakatineng" u pacebaay a ngangan pabacu' tu kalimucu' sapad buyu' u ngiha nu layakay tu "„āę„ÉÉ„Éź„É≥„āĹ„ā°„É≥" katineng tu ngangan nu kalimucu' sapat buyu' i pikantuk nu cenbu ayaw nu 1899 a mihca izaw tu. aca, "tazipaan a sapad" caay tu ku nu Lipunay a kamu. sumad ngangan 1954ŚĻī10śúą31 . 1954 a mihcaan cacay a bataan izaw ku tulu a bataan izaw ku cacay tu nu Bu-sin-syang. itawya nisutan i sin-bun,"Yin-cu-min a palimulak tu kalecuhan nu Cung-tung tungusay cumelak ku kanatal". u yakuba ku paketunay misinsin i sey-bu a malaheci. namahiza i Cyaw-pan adidi'ay a cacudadan nu wawa pasumad han ku ngangan Cye-suw adidi'ay a cacudadan han, pili' i pulecuhan ni Cyang-cung-cen miteka..2014 a mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad tusa a bataan izaw ku lima a demiad, Taw-yen a kuwan sumad han tu Csya-se tu Taw-yen a kenis hawsa, Bu-sin a kenis pasumad han tu se-sya a kakitizaantu Bu-sin a kakitizaan. panukas tu ngangan 2014ŚĻī" . 2014 a mihca "Taywan Yin-cu-min a niyazu' mikawaw tu masasepaw" nipaketunan sumad tu ngangan "Pi-ya-way' hakiya "Pi-ya-san" nglab ayawtu izaw tu ku natatengilan misumad tu ngangan "Cyaw-pan han", nika katuud ku paculiay a binawlan. lalangawan ungsing pikuwanan henay nu Lipun, Bu-sin a kenis lima ku nipatadas tu unsing, macacidek u S-lin unsing, Sin-sin unsing, Kaw-i' unsing, Pa-lin-cyaw unsing, Siw-u-lay unsing, cay ku Slin unsing atu Sin-sin unsing dada', izaw hena ku zumaay a unsing i capi nu siy-li a sasanga'an namisanga' maenip i diheb nu sauwac, Pa-lin a unsing i 1997 a mihca muliyaw makazih, pangangan han Ye-hen unsing.

paŇčaŇčan. . pikuwanan ńß…ôna nu r~…ĺipun, mikantukaj nu ¶…ôbu mid…ôm…ô ¶ tizaaj mu…ôn…ôŇč a jin- ¶u-min, pasumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan nu kakitizaan tu " ¶ijaw-pan-san" ŇčaŇčan tu mizipa Ē~ ° ku kuku Ē~ ° kakitizaantu bu-sin a kakitizaan. panukas tu ŇčaŇčan *****" . **** a mińß ¶a "tajwan jin- ¶u-min a nijazu Ē~ ° mikawaw tu masas…ôpaw" nipak…ôtunan sumad tu ŇčaŇčan "pi-ja-waj Ē~ ° ńßakija "pi-ja-san"
